name: claude-skills
description: Shared Claude Code skills. Currently: project-bootstrap — starts and maintains a project-discipline system (CLAUDE.md, PROJECT_STATE, ADRs, conventions, glossary, risks).

plugins.name: project-bootstrap
plugins.description: Kickoff, adopt, and resume routines that keep software work documented, reversible, and resumable across sessions — with a team overlay for branch/PR/review workflows.
